LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER VIOLETA LYUBELSKAYA'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDUMUS WILL BE HEARD BY JUDGE QUINN AT 2:00 P.M. ON OCTOBER 20, 2016 IN DEPARTMENT 302. THE STAY OF THE SUSPENSION OF THE DRIVING PRIVILEGE THAT WAS SET TO EXPIRE ON OCTOBER 12, 2016 IS EXTENDED THROUGH OCTOBER 20, 2016. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER VIOLETA LYUBELSKAYA'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDUMUS IS OFF CALENDAR. PETITIONER FAILED TO FILE A VERIFIED PETITION IN CONFORMITY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1086. PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED. PETITIONER HAS 10 DAYS TO FILE A VERIFIED PETITION. THE STAY OF THE SUSPENSION OF PETITIONER'S DRIVING PRIVILEGE IS DISSOLVED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Mandumus
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Text Disposition
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER VIOLETA LYUBELSKAYA'S Petition For Writ Of Mandumus is OFF CALENDAR. Petitioner failed to file a verified petition in conformity with Code of Civil Procedure Section 1086. Petitioner's request for leave to amend is granted. Petitioner has 10 days to file a verified petition. The stay of the suspension of petitioner's driving privilege is dissolved. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Mandumus
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Continued To Oct-20-16 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PETITIONER VIOLETA LYUBELSKAYA'S Petition For Writ Of Mandumus will be heard by Judge Quinn at 2:00 p.m. on October 20, 2016 in Department 302. The stay of the suspension of the driving privilege that was set to expire on October 12, 2016 is extended through October 20, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
